burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to stroke risk and hospitalization

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ECG with sawtooth flutter waves; confirm with rhythm monitoring if intermittent

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ECG widely available; Holter in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Rate control and anticoagulation; catheter ablation is definitive
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited electrophysiology centers and ablation access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SBC guidelines and growing EP capacity
